title: Dryopteris arfakiana
taxonomy: Dryopteris arfakiana is classified within the family Dryopteridaceae, which is a group of ferns commonly known as wood ferns. This species belongs to the genus Dryopteris, which includes various species of wood ferns found in different parts of the world. The genus Dryopteris is further divided into several sections, each containing species with distinct characteristics. As a member of the Dryopteris genus, Dryopteris arfakiana is closely related to other species within the same group. The classification of Dryopteris arfakiana is based on its morphological and molecular characteristics.
